title: Jing Hai’s Website
text:
This is a Quarto website.
To learn more about Quarto websites visit https://quarto.org/docs/websites.




Welcome 👋
Hi! My name is Jing Hai.
I am a university student currently learning how to build websites using Quarto, RStudio, and GitHub Pages.
This website is created for my lab assignment and to practice web development skills.


About Me 🌟
I enjoy: - Gaming 🎮 - Technology 💻 - Artificial Intelligence 🤖 - Learning new coding skills 📚


My Goals 🚀
Some things I hope to learn in the future: - Building better websites - Creating apps - Learning data analysis - Exploring AI projects


Thank You 🙌
Thank you for visiting my website!

title: Practice
text:
About This Website
This website was created for my lab assignment.
The Singapore Institute of Technology (SIT) is Singapore’s first University of Applied Learning and the third largest university by intake in Singapore. SIT’s mission is to maximise the potential of our learners and to innovate with industry, through an integrated applied learning and research approach, so as to contribute to the economy and society.
